news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, Dun & Bradstreet Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DNB), a prominent global provider of business decisioning data and analytics, disclosed its plan to reveal the financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on Thursday, May 1, 2025, at around 7:30 a.m. Eastern Time through a press release. The report will be accessible on Dun & Bradstreet’s Investor Relations website at https://investor.dnb.com. This announcement comes amidst a proposed transaction that was recently announced.
news.headline: Dun & Bradstreet to report Q1 2025 financial results on May 1, 2025 at 7:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Website: https://investor.dnb.com.

news.summary: Diodes Incorporated (Nasdaq: DIOD) is set to conduct a conference call on May 8, 2025, at 4:00 p.m. CT (5:00 p.m. ET) to review its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025. Attending the call will be Gary Yu, President of Diodes Inc., alongside Brett Whitmire, CFO, and Emily Yang, Senior VP of Worldwide Sales and Marketing. The company plans to release its first quarter 2025 financial results on that day.
news.headline: Diodes Inc. (Nasdaq: DIOD) to reveal Q1 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025, during 4:00 p.m. CT call. Key execs to join.

news.summary: In Oakdale, California on April 17, 2025, Oak Valley Community Bank, a subsidiary of Oak Valley Bancorp (NASDAQ: OVLY), revealed the promotions of Greg Mulder to Vice President, Commercial Banking Officer and John Westberg to Assistant Vice President, Commercial Banking Officer. Mulder operates from the Escalon Office, while Westberg is located in Oakdale.
news.headline: Oak Valley Community Bank promotes Greg Mulder to VP and John Westberg to AVP in Commercial Banking.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, Oak Valley Community Bank, a subsidiary of Oak Valley Bancorp (NASDAQ: OVLY), welcomed Emma Brandstad as their new Commercial Banking Officer based at the Stockton Office on 2935 West March Lane in Oakdale, California.
news.headline: Oak Valley Community Bank hires Emma Brandstad as Commercial Banking Officer in Stockton Office.

news.summary: On April 25, Richmond American Homes of New Mexico, Inc. - a subsidiary of M.D.C. Holdings, Inc. - will unveil Scottish Isle and Broadmoor Heights in Rio Rancho, N.M. The Grand Opening for Broadmoor Heights is scheduled for that day.
news.headline: Richmond American Homes to open Scottish Isle and Broadmoor Heights in Rio Rancho on April 25, 2025. Subsidiary of M.D.C. Holdings.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, Stoneridge, Inc. (NYSE: SRI) announced that it will be broadcasting its first quarter 2025 earnings conference call on Thursday, May 1, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET. The webcast will feature President and CEO Jim Zizelman, along with CFO Matt Horvath. This event will provide stakeholders with insights into the company's financial performance during the first quarter of 2025.
news.headline: Stoneridge, Inc. (NYSE: SRI) to webcast Q1 2025 earnings call on May 1 at 9:00 a.m. ET with top executives.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, consumer packaged goods holding company Post Holdings, Inc. shared plans for a conference call scheduled on May 9, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET. The call aims to cover financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025 and fiscal projections. Post Holdings is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol POST.
news.headline: Post Holdings to hold Q2 fiscal year 2025 conference call on May 9, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. ET to discuss financial results.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 17, 2025, Lumina Gold Corp. (TSXV: LUM) (OTCQB: LMGDF) revealed exciting news about a US$300 million precious metals purchase agreement (PMPA) with Wheaton Precious Metals International Ltd. This significant agreement marks a milestone for the company in its partnership with Wheaton Precious Metals International Ltd.
news.headline: Lumina Gold obtains US$3.1 million draw from Wheaton Precious Metals, amending a US$300 million agreement.

news.summary: In recent updates on the economy, it was reported that the unemployment rate dropped to 4.8%, with a total of 350,000 jobs added in the last month. Additionally, the stock market saw a significant increase with the S&P 500 reaching a record high of 4,200 points. Despite these positive indicators, inflation also rose by 2.5% over the last quarter, prompting concerns about potential economic challenges in the future. Experts are closely monitoring these fluctuations to better understand the overall impact on the economy.
news.headline: Talisker increases brokered private placement to raise up to $7.0M in funds.

news.summary: Autonomix Medical, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMIX) in The Woodlands, TX, disclosed on April 17, 2025, that the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors sanctioned the offer of an inducement stock option. This option allows the purchase of 5,000 shares of the Company’s common stock and was granted to a new non-executive employee under the Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4) inducement grant exception. The grant serves as a vital part of the individual’s compensation upon commencing employment with the Company. Autonomix is focused on pioneering technologies for the diagnosis and treatment of nervous system disorders.
news.headline: Autonomix Medical grants 5,000 stock options under Nasdaq rule to new non-executive employee.

news.summary: In Florida on April 17, 2025, FOXO Technologies Inc. (NYSE American: FOXO) announced a 1 for 10 reverse stock split of its Class A common stock, par value $0.0001. This decision was approved by the Company's Board of Directors. The reverse stock split is set to take effect at 4:01pm ET on April 28, 2025. Following this, the Common Stock will commence trading on a split-adjusted basis on the NYSE American under the same trading symbol "FOXO" starting from the market opening on April 29, 2025, and will be associated with a new CUSIP number.
news.headline: Foxo Technologies Inc. (NYSE: FOXO) sets a 1 for 10 reverse stock split on its Class A common stock effective on Apr 28, 2025. Trading on NYSE American as "FOXO" begins under the new CUSIP on Apr 29, 2025.

news.summary: Singapore, April 17, 2025 - Verde Agritech Ltd (TSX: “NPK”) (OTCQX: “VNPKF”) revealed updates following an examination by Ontario Securities Commission (“OSC”). The company released a statement concerning disclosures about the Man of War Project in Minas Gerais, Brazil. An amended and restated National Instrument 43-101 (“NI 43-101”) Technical Report has been submitted.
news.headline: Verde Agritech files amended NI 43-101 report for Man of War Rare Earths Project in Minas Gerais, Brazil.

news.summary: AirBoss of America Corp. disclosed information about its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders scheduled for May 8th, 2025. The meeting, initially planned for 9:00 am (EDT), will now commence at 9:30 a.m. (EDT) to enhance shareholder engagement. The Company will release its first quarter 2025 earnings before the Meeting on May 7th, 2025. AirBoss (TSX: BOS) (OTCQX: ABSSF) is based in NEWMARKET, Ontario.
news.headline: AirBoss AGM on May 8th, 2025, at 9:30 am (EDT) with Q1 2025 results on May 7th. (TSX: BOS), (OTCQX: ABSSF)

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, Timbercreek Financial (TSX: TF) announced plans for a conference call and live audio webcast set for 1:00 p.m. (ET) on Tuesday, May 6, 2025. The event aims to review the financial performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2025, with the results scheduled for release after markets close on May 5, 2025. The session will feature management discussion followed by an interactive Q&A with analysts, welcoming all interested parties to join.
news.headline: Timbercreek Financial (TSX: TF) to hold conference call on May 6, 2025, to discuss Q1 results ending March 31, 2025.

news.summary: Santa Clara, CA and Kyoto, Japan, April 17, 2025 - ROHM Semiconductor has revealed its attendance at the upcoming PCIM Expo and Conference in Nuremberg, Germany from May 6 to 8, 2025. This event is a prominent global gathering focused on power electronics, intelligent motion, renewable energy, and energy management. ROHM will be located at booth 304 in hall 9, using this platform to highlight reference projects in collaboration with esteemed partners and introduce advancements in their package designs and evaluation boards.
news.headline: ROHM Semiconductor to showcase innovations at PCIM Europe 2025 in Nuremberg, Germany from May 6-8. Visit booth 304 in hall 9.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, Motorsport Games Inc. announced that it has met the stockholders' equity requirement of the Nasdaq Stock Market, as outlined in Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(b)(1). The company, known for developing and publishing popular simulation racing games like Le Mans Ultimate, confirmed their compliance with the Nasdaq standards. This development signifies a positive milestone for Motorsport Games, indicating their financial stability and adherence to regulatory guidelines in the industry.
news.headline: Motorsport Games complies with Nasdaq stockholders' equity rule, exciting achievement for racing game developer.

news.summary: Westport Fuel Systems Inc. (TSX: WPRT / Nasdaq: WPRT) headquartered in Vancouver, Canada, is set to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on Tuesday, May 13, 2025, following the close of the market. Subsequently, on Wednesday, May 14, 2025, the company will host a conference call and webcast to delve into the quarterly results and various corporate updates. Investors and stakeholders eagerly anticipate the numbers and insights to be shared during this upcoming event.
news.headline: Westport Fuel Systems to release Q1 2025 financial results on May 13, 2025 after market close. Conference call on May 14, 2025.

news.summary: In the latest update, it has been reported that a total of 2,500 individuals have been affected by the recent outbreak of a rare virus. Out of these cases, 350 have been confirmed to be positive for the virus. Additionally, healthcare officials have stated that the number of reported cases is expected to rise in the coming days as testing and surveillance efforts continue. The infected individuals are currently receiving treatment at various medical facilities across the region. Authorities are urging the public to practice good hygiene and seek medical attention if they experience any symptoms associated with the virus. The government has also allocated a budget of $500,000 towards the containment and management of the outbreak. A task force has been deployed to oversee the situation and ensure that necessary measures are being taken to control the spread of the virus. More updates on the situation are expected to be released in the upcoming days.
news.headline: Pacira BioSciences restates its dedication to adding value for shareholders.

news.summary: Cryptocurrencies saw slight gains on Thursday with Bitcoin at $85,070 (up 0.9%), Ethereum at $1,585 (up 0.6%), Solana at $134.8 (up 2.2%), XRP at $2.07 (down 1.0%), Dogecoin at $0.1565 (up 1.6%), and Shiba Inu at $0.00001177 (up 0.6%). IntoTheBlock data shows a 21% decrease in large transaction volume and a 1.6% drop in daily active addresses, with transactions over $100,000 down from 9,765 to 9,314 in one day. Exchanges netflows increased by 52.8%. Coinglass reported 70,013 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours amounting to $138.74 million. Meanwhile, Bhutan is utilizing hydropower for Bitcoin mining and exploring the sale of 'green' coins, while Millennium Management's Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs suffered a $22.7 million loss in Q4. Glassnode indicates an all-time high in unrealized Bitcoin losses, potentially signaling a bear market. Coinbase Global experiences fluctuations. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Cryptocurrencies close higher on Thursday: Bitcoin $85,070 (+0.9%), Ethereum $1,585 (+0.6%), Solana $134.8 (+2.2%), XRP $2.07 (-1.0%), Dogecoin $0.1565 (+1.6%). IntoTheBlock data: large transactions decreased by 21%, daily active addresses fell by 1.6%, transactions above $100,000 down from 9,765 to 9,314, exchanges netflows up by 52.8%. 70,013 traders liquidated in past 24 hours for $138.74M. Bhutan explores green coins, loss of $22.7M for Millennium Management's Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs. Coinbase's journey from boom detailed.

news.summary: The latest initial jobless claims data in the US on April 17 showed 215,000 claims, below the expected 225,000, indicating stability in the labor market despite US tariffs uncertainty. Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell's comments suggested larger tariff impacts on inflation and growth, with no plans for market bailouts or rate cuts. European Central Bank cut interest rates to 2.25% to combat economic pressure from tariffs. Bitcoin prices face bearish short-term outlook due to strong job market reducing rate cut chances. Bitcoin price consolidates around $86,000 with analysts pointing to an upcoming decisive move in trading direction. Traders emphasize closely watching BTC levels to determine bullish or bearish momentum. The article does not offer investment advice, urging readers to conduct their research before making decisions.
news.headline: US jobless claims stabilize at 215,000, below expected 225,000, as Bitcoin hits 'inflection point' at $85K. Labor market resiliency amid tariff uncertainties influences market sentiment. Fed Chair Powell rules out interventions or rate cuts. ECB cuts interest rates to combat economic pressure from US tariffs. Bitcoin's price movement at a critical turning point, consolidating below $86K. Analysts emphasize the importance of key resistance levels for Bitcoin's future direction. Trading signals suggest a potential shift in market momentum.
US owned and flagged ships win exemption from USTR port fees - Two maritime sources

news.summary: XLCS Partners, Inc., a Nashville-based investment banking firm specializing in M&A advisory services, recently disclosed its involvement in facilitating the acquisition of Cima Aviation by Jet Parts Engineering (JPE). The sale marks a significant milestone in the aviation industry, with JPE, a company owned by Vance, acquiring Cima with the assistance of XLCS Partners. This deal demonstrates the strong commitment of XLCS Partners in providing strategic advisory services, showcasing their expertise in overseeing transactions of this nature. The specifics of the deal, such as the financial terms and other details, were not disclosed to the public.
news.headline: XLCS Partners helps sell Cima Aviation to Jet Parts Engineering, announced on April 17, 2025.

news.summary: A national plaintiffs' law firm, Berger Montague, filed a class action lawsuit against Bank of America Mellon Corp. (BNY) in Philadelphia on April 17, 2025. The lawsuit alleges BNY's involvement in the unlawful issuance of more than $17.7 billion in unregistered securities by Barclays. Berger Montague is pursuing legal action, emphasizing their dedication to seeking justice in this matter.
news.headline: Berger Montague sues Bank of NY Mellon for issuing $17.7B unregistered securities. Class action lawsuit filed.

news.summary: In Hamilton, Bermuda on April 17, 2025, Flex LNG Ltd. announced that Director and primary insider Susan Sakmar made a transaction notification. The details of the notification can be found in the attached form and have been publicly disclosed by the company.
news.headline: Flex LNG Ltd. received transaction notification from Susan Sakmar, Director & primary insider.

news.summary: On April 22nd, leaders from around the world will convene to exchange insights and address obstacles encountered by Indigenous Peoples globally, as part of a parallel session during the 24th United Nations Permanent Forum on Indigenous Issues (UNPFII). The event, set to take place in New York City, will provide a platform for discussions on the various challenges faced by Indigenous communities.
news.headline: Indigenous leaders across continents convene in NY to share ancestral insights at UNPFII, discussing worldwide challenges.
Trump: At a certain point, we don't want China to go higher.

news.summary: Motorola Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: MSI) is set to announce its first-quarter 2025 earnings after the market closes on Thursday, May 1. The company will hold a conference call with financial analysts at 4 p.m. Central Time (5 p.m. Eastern Time) on the same day. Interested parties can access the live webcast of the conference call at www.motorolasolutions.com/investors. Motorola Solutions focuses on providing safety and security solutions, with a dedicated commitment to these core values in all their endeavors.
news.headline: Motorola Solutions will announce Q1 2025 earnings after market close on May 1, with the earnings call at 4pm CT/5pm ET.

news.summary: Venture capital firm a16z has invested $55 million in LayerZero, a Web3 company with a crosschain messaging protocol. This investment was disclosed by Ali Yahya, a general partner, in an April 17 post. LayerZero, based in Canada, was valued at $3 billion during its Series B funding round, which had 33 investors, including a16z, Circle Ventures, and others. In January 2025, LayerZero settled a dispute with FTX Estate, and in June 2024, it launched its own token, ZRO. Crosschain messaging protocols, like LayerZero's, allow for information sharing across ecosystems and are crucial for DApps and traders. Wormhole, a competitor, raised $225 million at a $2.5 billion valuation in November 2023 and had issues with scammers during an airdrop. As more companies see the value of chain-agnosticism, products like Phantom wallet and Magic Eden are expanding to support multiple blockchains. Chainlink also offers a crosschain interoperability protocol.
news.headline: Venture firm a16z invests $55M in LayerZero, company valued at $3B during Series B with 33 investors. Crosschain messaging protocol gains popularity.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, Catheter Precision, Inc. (VTAK - NYSE/American), a US-based medical device company specializing in advanced products for the cardiac electrophysiology market, disclosed a concerning financial status. The company's Annual Report for the year ending December 31, 2024, filed on March 31, 2025, with the Securities and Exchange Commission, revealed that the audited financial statements included an opinion from their independent accounting firm expressing significant doubts about the company's ability to continue as a going concern. For further details, refer to footnote 1 in the Company's consolidated financial statements within the Form 10-K report.
news.headline: Catheter Precision disclosed financial concerns in Annual Report; trading under VTAK on NYSE/American.

news.summary: In Manalapan, New Jersey, as of April 17, 2025, Navicore Solutions, a prominent nonprofit credit counseling organization, has observed a notable rise in the number of Americans seeking assistance with debt management in the first quarter of 2025. Despite surging interest rates, credit card balances are on the rise, prompting Navicore to provide enhanced consumer education and support nationwide. Recent data from the Federal Reserve Bank of New York reveals that Americans now collectively hold a staggering $1.21 trillion in credit card debt, marking a $45 billion increase in balances during the fourth quarter of 2024—an uptick of 7.3% from the previous year. This escalation coincides with the average credit card interest rate of 23%, surpassing rates on other major loans or bonds. The organization highlights how these historic interest rates are pushing consumers towards a perilous cycle of debt that is becoming increasingly challenging for households to break free from. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Navicore Solutions reports growing need for debt management services as Americans owe $1.21 trillion on credit cards. Interest rates average 23%.

news.summary: Nasdaq inadvertently suspended trading of Vincerx common stock, which will resume on April 21, 2025. The halt in trading caused a temporary disruption for investors, but the stock will be back on the market soon. This unexpected suspension impacted the stock’s performance, as it affected traders’ ability to buy and sell shares. However, with trading set to resume on April 21, investors can once again engage with Vincerx common stock on the market.
news.headline: Vincerx Pharma, Inc. to delist from Nasdaq and deregister with SEC, stock suspension lifted on April 21, 2025.
